answer:
<think> I know that Queensbury, New York is a town in Warren County, New York. I also know that it was named after Queen Charlotte of Mecklenburg-Strelitz, who was the wife of King George III of England. To determine the year she was married to King George III, I need to recall that King George III ascended to the throne in 1760 and married Queen Charlotte in 1761. Therefore, the year Queen Charlotte was married to King George III is 1761. </think>
<answer> 1761 </answer>
